title: Quantifying Cell-State Densities in Single-Cell Phenotypic Landscapes using Mellon
author: Dominik Otto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Processed data use in the  the Mellon manuscript 

 The following scanpy anndata objects are also available 

 
	 preprocessed_t-cell-depleted-bm-rna.h5ad: Anndata object for the RNA modality of the T-cell depleted bone marrow multiome dataset with normalized data, cell type annotations, clusters, pseudo time, fate propensities, MAGIC imputed expression data, cell-state densities, B-cell primed and lineage accessibility scores. 
	 preprocessed_t-cell-depleted-bm-atac.h5ad: Anndata object for the RNA modality of the T-cell depleted bone marrow multiome dataset with normalized data, cell type annotations, clusters, cell-state densities, B-cell primed and lineage peaks. 
	 preprocessed_t-cell-depleted-bm-rna-metacells.h5ad: Anndata object with metacells for the RNA modality of the T-cell depleted bone marrow multiome dataset . 
	 preprocessed_mouse-gastrulation-atlas.h5ad: Anndata object of the preprocessed mouse gastrulation data with normalized data, cell type annotations, clusters, pseudo time, fate propensities, MAGIC imputed expression data,
